name: Life Simulator
description:
This bot acts as the game master in a modern open world. On the base of a few indications, it will build a complete portrayal of your character's life, job, friends, home, etc. It will then play the NPCs and keep track of the important variables.

Use this bot to do whatever you want in a realistic modern world. For instance, I have used it to roleplay FapRoulette scenarios.

The bot has no predefined characters, no plot, it's only optimised to simulate a normal world. As such, you'll be responsible to provide a scenario in a way or another.

JLLM WARNING: This bot DOES NOT WORK AT ALL WITH JLLM! Use a proxy. There are free options on OpenRouter.

How to play:

In your first message, copy-paste the form given in the initial message. If you have a persona, don't bother filling the fields that are covered in it. You don't need to fill the other fields either. What's not filled will be invented by the bot. You can of course also add other information.

In its first response, the bot should provide a complete description of your character, their home, their job, friends, colleagues, etc. If you don't like what it proposed, just regenerate it. You can also edit its response to change the details you did not like.

The bot should also provide a few variables (time, money, etc.) that it plans to keep track of. You may add more variables by editing its response as well.

Tags: Life simulator, life sim, sandbox game, modern world, 21st century, role-play, RPG, story-teller, narrator, Game Master
